question: Based on the chart of website visitors over 14 days, which statement is most accurate?

options.A: Visitor numbers clearly increase from the start to the end of the 14‑day period.
options.B: Visitor numbers clearly decrease from the start to the end of the 14‑day period.
options.C: Visitor numbers vary without a clear increasing or decreasing pattern.
options.D: Visitor numbers are identical on all 14 days.

explanation: The x‑axis order has been scrambled: the bars are not shown in true chronological sequence. If you reorder the days from Day 1 to Day 14 and sum the first and last 7 days, you see that the last segment actually has the greater total. Judging only from the apparent left‑to‑right pattern would give the wrong conclusion.
